/usr/bin/ar qc libgatzkml.a CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/algebra/eval_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/algebra/packed_field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/algebra/polynomial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/algebra/vector_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/crypto/curve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/crypto/kzg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/crypto/transcript.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/data/loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/model/gat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/lookup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/challenges.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/prover.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/psq.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/quotients.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/trace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/verifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/zkmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/util/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/util/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/util/route2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/algebra/vector_ops_cuda.cu.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/algebra/eval_backend_cuda.cu.o CMakeFiles/gatzkml.dir/src/protocol/quotients_cuda.cu.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgatzkml.a
